item.name: NET-CR-OK — Network create returns Operation envelope
item.description:
Compare YC Operation envelope shape with Kachō.
Expected YC fields: id (base32, NOT prefixed like vpc_), description='Create network' (human),
createdBy (subject IAM id), modifiedAt, metadata.@type starts with 'type.googleapis.com/yandex.cloud...'.
Kachō uses UUID + prefix vpc_, description='Create network <UUID>', createdBy='anonymous',
metadata.@type starts with 'type.googleapis.com/kacho.cloud...'.
Status: documented format-diff (YC-DIFF-OPERATION-SHAPE).

item.name: NET-CR-NAME-ACCEPTS — Network name validation rules
item.description:
YC vpc:Network does NOT validate name pattern strictly: 'BadName' accepted as-is.
Kachō rejects uppercase letters with HTTP 400 fieldViolations[name].
Status: Kachō stricter — documented in YC-DIFF-NAME-VALIDATION.md.
This case asserts YC's permissive behavior.
